series_metadata.series_description: This form is used by non-resident taxpayers electing to file a composite return on behalf of 2 or more non-resident shareholders in an S Corporation. This form is filed between January 1 and April 15.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain original for 4 years from due date then destroy. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Retain original for 4 years from due date then delete., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
